'''zhanodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldishness|oldishness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldishness|oldishness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhanodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænedeth|zhænedeth]] || [[word:zhænedej|zhænedej]] || [[word:zhænedesh|zhænedesh]] || [[word:zhænede|zhænede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhanonodoth|zhanonodoth]] || [[word:zhanonodoj|zhanonodoj]] || [[word:zhanonodosh|zhanonodosh]] || [[word:zhanonodo|zhanonodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanodoth|zhanodoth]] || [[word:zhanodoj|zhanodoj]] || [[word:zhanodosh|zhanodosh]] || [[word:zhanodo|zhanodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanofdoth|zhanofdoth]] || [[word:zhanofdoj|zhanofdoj]] || [[word:zhanofdosh|zhanofdosh]] || [[word:zhanofdof|zhanofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanodotho|zhanodotho]] || [[word:zhanodojo|zhanodojo]] || [[word:zhanodosho|zhanodosho]] || [[word:zhanodoko|zhanodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanodoth|zhanodoth]] || [[word:zhanodoj|zhanodoj]] || [[word:zhanodosh|zhanodosh]] || [[word:zhanodo|zhanodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanodothol|zhanodothol]] || [[word:zhanodojol|zhanodojol]] || [[word:zhanodoshol|zhanodoshol]] || [[word:zhanodokol|zhanodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanodothotho|zhanodothotho]] || [[word:zhanodojojo|zhanodojojo]] || [[word:zhanodoshosho|zhanodoshosho]] || [[word:zhanodoko|zhanodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanodothon|zhanodothon]] || [[word:zhanodojon|zhanodojon]] || [[word:zhanodoshon|zhanodoshon]] || [[word:zhanodokon|zhanodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanodothoro|zhanodothoro]] || [[word:zhanodojoro|zhanodojoro]] || [[word:zhanodoshoro|zhanodoshoro]] || [[word:zhanodokoro|zhanodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
